title: Oscars 2026: The best jokes from Conan O’Brien’s monologue
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Conan O'Brien hosted the Oscars for the second year in a row, blending humor and self-deprecation.
O'Brien's monologue included jokes about Netflix, Timothee Chalamet, and the future of Oscar broadcasts.
Jimmy Kimmel joined as a guest collaborator, adding political humor during the Best Documentary presentation.

title: Fundraiser: Community remembers Danvers mother, nurse killed in her home
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Danvers resident and nurse Janet Swallow, 68, was fatally stabbed in her home by a high school student.
A GoFundMe campaign has raised nearly $50,000 to support Swallow's family, aiming for a $65,000 goal.
Anthony DeMayo, 18, admitted to the murder and is undergoing psychiatric evaluation after suggesting premeditation.

title: Northeastern women’s hockey advances to Frozen Four after defeating Minnesota
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Northeastern women's hockey team advances to Frozen Four after defeating Minnesota 4-2 in NCAA Quarterfinals.
Sophomore goaltender Lisa Jönsson made 45 saves, helping Northeastern secure their spot in the Frozen Four.
Northeastern will face No. 1 Ohio State in the Frozen Four on March 20 at Penn State's Pegula Ice Arena.

title: Bomb threat reportedly halts plane at Logan ‘for hours’ before being deemed ‘not credible’
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Bomb threat halted a JetBlue flight at Boston Logan for hours, deemed not credible by State Police.
Authorities including FBI and bomb-sniffing dogs searched the plane bound for Vero Beach, Florida.
Passengers' luggage was inspected by bomb-detecting dogs; no arrests have been made related to the threat.

title: 17 arrested during St. Patrick’s Day parade in South Boston, police say
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Seventeen people were arrested at the St. Patrick's Day parade in South Boston, police reported public drinking violations.
Boston police could not provide specific charges, but dozens of alcoholic 'borgs' were confiscated at Broadway Station.
Residents reported underage drinking and public indecency during the parade, with complaints referred to police and fire departments.

title: 2026 Oscars: Full list of winners (updating live)
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'One Battle After Another' wins Best Picture at the 2026 Oscars, achieving a total of six awards.
Michael B. Jordan receives Best Actor for 'Sinners,' the film wins four Oscars including Best Original Screenplay.
'KPop Demon Hunters' wins Best Animated Feature, while 'Frankenstein' secures Best Production Design and Best Costume Design.

title: Oscars red carpet: See the best Academy Awards fashion
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Stars like Kate Hudson and Timothee Chalamet showcased top fashion on the 2026 Oscars red carpet in Los Angeles.
Conan O'Brien hosted the Academy Awards for a second year, remaining discreet about his opening monologue.
Notable attendees included Leonardo DiCaprio, Emma Stone, Nicole Kidman, and Pedro Pascal among many others.

title: All the way from Indonesia, she’s running the Boston Marathon for people with visual impairments
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Fransisca Miraningtyas, 46, from Jakarta, Indonesia, is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for visually impaired people.
Miraningtyas has pterygium and has undergone eye surgery; she aims to raise awareness for accessible eye care.
She hopes her run will inspire support for those needing vision-restoring treatments beyond her own experience.

title: 5 takeaways from the Revolution’s 6-1 dismantling of FC Cincinnati
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: New England Revolution tied a club record with a 6-1 victory over FC Cincinnati in the 2026 home opener.
Center back Brayan Ceballos scored twice on corner kick headers, contributing to the Revolution's six unanswered goals.
Diego Fagundez returned to New England Revolution, providing a secondary assist after entering in stoppage time.

title: Man dies after kayak overturns off Cape Cod
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: A 22-year-old man died after his kayak overturned in Wellfleet, Cape Cod, on Saturday evening.
Emergency crews, including the U.S. Coast Guard, aided in an extensive search, locating the man nearly two hours later.
The man was taken to Cape Cod Hospital in critical condition and was pronounced dead after arrival.
